response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages including Python, JavaScript, and D, and a proven track record in building scalable systems and open-source tools — but lacks explicit evidence of leading experimentation platforms, AI-driven growth systems, or enterprise-scale telemetry frameworks required for the Principal role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with JavaScript/TypeScript and distributed systems
Proven ability to build and ship open-source infrastructure (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Strong data and systems thinking demonstrated in real-time, high-throughput services
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or owning experimentation frameworks or feature-flagging systems
Limited visibility into AI tooling usage or metrics-driven growth initiatives
Experience is fragmented across domains; lacks focused leadership in growth/platform engineering
